name: Enhance Lighting
prompt: Enhance this image to better lighting, remove shadows and brighten the subject

name: Studio Portrait
prompt: Transform this into a professional studio portrait with soft lighting

name: Monochromatic Background
prompt: Create a Monochromatic Color Effect for background, while keeping the main subject in original color

name: Clean Background
prompt: Clean up the background by adding a background blur while keeping the main subject sharp and clear

name: SnowField
prompt: 影视级真实质感，户外自然雪地场景，背景柔和动态虚化，细腻金色发丝光，光影层次丰富通透，背景适度压暗，暗部质感叠加，低饱和高级色调，画面干净写实，严格遵循原图透视关系与真实物理光影，特写镜头，地面水平端正，严格保留人物原表情、原姿势、原比例不变，细节精致，边缘自然，合成无痕
